'''Katarn's Hill''' was a hill on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] located near [[Fort Nowhere]]. 

==History==
It gained its name from the [[Sulon/Legends|Sulonese]] settlements established there in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]] by [[Morgan Katarn]]. Nearby was a ravine that the settlers used for waste disposal.<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

During the [[battle of Fort Nowhere]], [[Dinko (Human)|Dinko]] managed to shoot an attacking [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]], which crashed on the Hill.<ref name="JK" />
{{Nature-stub}}
